sections.heading: Phone calls on autopilot that actually get things done
sections.subheading: Build AI voice agents that answer calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and run outbound campaigns—around the clock.
sections.caption: No engineers. No phone systems to configure. Just sign up and go.

sections.label: HOW IT WORKS
sections.heading: Live in under 5 minutes
sections.tagline: No engineers, no phone systems to configure. Just sign up and go.

steps.title: Describe your business
steps.description: Tell your agent who you are, what you do, and how you want calls handled. Add any documents it should reference.

steps.title: Get a phone number
steps.description: Pick a local or toll-free number in seconds, or forward your existing line. Your agent is ready to take calls immediately.

steps.title: Let it run
steps.description: Your AI agent answers calls, qualifies leads, books appointments, and sends you transcripts—around the clock.

sections.label: EVERYTHING YOUR PHONE LINE NEEDS, BUILT IN
sections.heading: Replace your answering service and auto-dialer
sections.subheading: Biscuit gives you a single AI-powered platform tailored for local business.

capabilities.title: Ask the right questions first
capabilities.description: Lead qualification that ensures serious buyers.

cards.title: Natural Conversations
cards.description: Your agent sounds human, handles interruptions, and adapts to the caller. Choose from top models like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

cards.title: Outbound Campaigns
cards.description: Upload a CSV, set a schedule, and let your agent call through your list. Track every outcome in real time.

cards.title: Instant Phone Numbers
cards.description: Get a local or toll-free number in seconds, or forward your existing business line. Voice and SMS from one number.

cards.title: Transcripts & Insights
cards.description: Every call is transcribed and summarized automatically. See what callers ask, how long calls last, and what converts.

sections.heading: Built for businesses that live on the phone

items.title: Dental & medical offices
items.subtitle: Fill cancellations automatically
items.description: Don't let empty slots cost you. Biscuit confirms and backfills appointments effortlessly.

items.title: Real estate teams

items.title: Home services

items.title: Law firms & Salons

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subheading: Everything you need to know about setting up your Biscuit voice agent.

items.question: Can I keep my existing phone number?
items.answer: Yes! You can either pick a new local/toll-free number in seconds, or securely forward your existing business line to your Biscuit agent.

items.question: Does the AI sound robotic?
items.answer: Not at all. Biscuit utilizes the latest top-tier voice AI models (like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet) so your agent sounds completely natural, handles interruptions gracefully, and converses like a human.

items.question: Can it integrate with my calendar and CRM?
items.answer: Absolutely. Biscuit plugs into 35+ tools including GoHighLevel, Calendly, Google Calendar, and Slack to auto-fill appointments and push lead data directly to your dashboard.

items.question: How quickly can I be up and running?
items.answer: You can be live in under 5 minutes. No coding or complex phone system configuration is necessary. Just explain your business, grab a number, and you're set.

sections.heading: Stop missing calls. Start closing more.
sections.subheading: Set up your AI phone agent in minutes. No contracts, no hardware, no engineering team required.
sections.caption: Biscuit pays for itself on day one.
